Initial NPC system overhaul: added a "Live" tab to view each NPC's mood, status, and recent thoughts (work in progress).
Rewrote the multi-model narrative engine, greatly reducing tool misuse, broken-off narration, and degraded choices on weaker models.
Added a "Web Search" toggle (Anthropic / Gemini only; may incur extra cost).
Upgraded built-in models and pricing to the latest generation.
Improved world-card creation stability: a single faulty character no longer fails the whole creation.
Fixed reasoning-time display, error-copy button compatibility, and several other experience issues.
